properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v2 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Praise Him all you sinners Sing oh sing you weary Oh praise Him all you children of God We lift high His glory Shown throughout our stories We praise Him as the children of God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Our great Redeemer glorious Savior Your Name is higher than the rising sun Light of the morning You shine forever Your Name is higher than the rising sun (oh) Your Name is higher than the rising sun

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Praise His Name forever Speak it loud and clear now Oh praise Him all you children of God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh oh oh oh, oh oh oh oh

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Hallelujah name above all Simply to speak Your Name is praise Hallelujah now and always Forever we lift Your Name in praise Hallelujah our God You reign Simply to speak Your Name is praise oh

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Hallelujah name above all Hallelujah name above all Hallelujah Hallelujah
